name: Beef Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle or Dutch oven, brown the short ribs over low heat. Drain well.
2. Stir in water, undrained tomatoes, onion, beef bouillion granules, salt, basil, and Worcestershire sauce. Cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
3. Stir in carrots, celery, barley, green pepper, and parsley. Cover and simmer for an additional 45 minutes.
4. Remove the ribs and cut off any meat, discarding the bones. Skim off fat from the soup.
5. Return the meat to the soup and heat through.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Makes 8 servings.
